title: Grilled Jamaican Shrimp Skewers with Flaxseed Crust
description: Sweet and spicy Jamaican-inspired shrimp skewers with a crunchy flaxseed crust, perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Jamaican Jerk Seasoning, lime juice, and honey.
Add flaxseed meal to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Add soy sauce and stir until smooth.
Add shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat evenly.
Thread shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Brush skewers with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until shrimp are pink and cooked through.
